results.rendered_html:
ālola a. Slightly
1 trembling, rolling (as eyes); ālolāyatalocanāḥ  Bh. 3. 48. 
2 Shaken, agitated; ālolāmalakāvalīṃ  Amaru. 3 ; krīḍālolāḥ  Me. 61. 
— laḥ Trembling, agitation.
